name: Sign event contract with Rodriguez family
desc: Send DocuSign link, collect signed copy, file

name: Book Carmen Davidson photography
desc: Confirm date availability and send deposit invoice

name: Waltz rehearsal schedule with Mary Jensen
desc: Agree on 4 Saturday rehearsal dates July–Sept

name: Confirm Emerald Hall A/V and floor plan
desc: Verify DJ booth placement, projector screen, lighting rig

name: Collect DJ playlist from Rodriguez family
desc: Must-play, do-not-play, and hora loca songs

name: Finalize catering headcount
desc: 120 guests — confirm final number with venue by Oct 10

name: Client intake call — Fuentes family
desc: Gather event details, theme preferences, budget range

name: Send Fuentes contract for signature
desc: DocuSign — Momentos by Chris event services contract

name: Book mariachi band — Fuentes cocktail hour
desc: Need 4-piece mariachi, 6–7 PM slot at Las Palmas

name: Venue walkthrough — Las Palmas Banquet Hall
desc: Scout layout for 90 guests, check parking, confirm catering kitchen

name: Sign event contract — Rodriguez Quinceañera
desc: Send DocuSign link, collect signed copy, file

name: Pay venue deposit — Fuentes Quinceañera
desc: Process deposit through PayPal, log in QuickBooks

name: Book DJ and lighting — Castillo Milestone
desc: Confirm load-in, backup speaker, wireless mic

name: Confirm florist order — Reyes Quinceañera
desc: 12 centerpieces, 2 entrance arrangements, head-table garland

name: Order balloon arch materials — Cookie Season 2026
desc: Client tones, extra to avoid sag, order in bulk

name: Stage centerpiece vases — Rodriguez Quinceañera
desc: Tall vases with LED bases, test the glow

name: Confirm cake with baker — Fuentes Quinceañera
desc: Two tiers, flavors, delivery window morning-of

name: Rehearse court choreography — Castillo Milestone
desc: Waltz plus surprise dance, five couples

name: Pull decor from garage — Reyes Quinceañera
desc: Tablecloths, chair sashes, backdrop panels

desc: Setup, entrance, waltz, dinner, cake times

desc: Walkie channels and station assignments
